transcript: The man deliberately accosts the rich woman, and it takes the opportunity to scan her iris information. Using the camera inside the glasses, it then pretends to hand her a business card and clones her cell phone data. The team immediately copies the iris data of the woman into contact lenses, which Janie puts on and heads to the casino's underground vault. Janie puts on her contact lenses and heads to the casino's underground vault, where her teammates have set the vault surveillance system to Lou, who finds the password on the tycoon's cell phone, which is correctly entered, followed by an iris scan and passes through the verification process. By utilizing the iris information on the contact lenses, her teammates tell Jenny to evacuate, but it's too late. The security guards have already arrived to arrest Jenny. The woman comes to interrogate Jenny. What were you doing in the basement of my hotel? I was looking for the bathroom, and I must have accidentally wandered into the basement of your hotel. The woman, of course, doesn't believe.
